gate.reason: reviewable LOC 5463 exceeds block threshold 800; production files 21 exceeds block threshold 8; total files 54 exceeds block threshold 25

sizing.summary: Final diff gate requires re-slicing through PRSG-007 sizing context.

suggested_slice_boundaries.title: Regenerate reviewable slices
suggested_slice_boundaries.rationale: No usable layer plan was available at the final gate boundary.

autopilot_continuation.completion_condition: Autopilot may report completion only after valid slice PR emission or an operator-owned typed exception is committed.

operator_steps.action: Re-run atomicity routing and sizing context.
operator_steps.when: Use when sizing or route evidence is missing, stale, or conflicts with the final diff.
operator_steps.expected_result: A current PRSG-007 route and thresholds are available for re-slicing.

operator_steps.action: Regenerate the layer plan from the current tasks.
operator_steps.when: Use when the layer plan is missing, invalid, or stale after PRSG-007 routing.
operator_steps.expected_result: A valid PRSG-008 layer plan with reviewable slice boundaries is available.

operator_steps.action: Hand off valid slices to multi-PR emission.
operator_steps.when: Use only after PRSG-007 routing and PRSG-008 layer planning are current and valid.
operator_steps.expected_result: PRSG-009 emits reviewable PR candidates instead of one oversized PR.

resume.next_action: Refresh PRSG-007 routing and sizing evidence.
resume.operator_message: Final reviewability gate blocked before PR body generation, gh pr create, or multi-PR emission.
resume.blocked_until: PR side effects are blocked until a valid reviewable slice plan exists or an explicit operator-owned typed exception is committed; the autopilot run must continue internally through autopilot_continuation before reporting completion.
